caption:
When colour becomes a feeling, you stop choosing and start collecting.

There's something about wrapping yourself in a cashmere cloud painted this vividly — it doesn't matter that the sun is already doing its best work out there. Some pieces make you want to layer up just to show them off. Peak season energy, but make it chromatic.

Cashmere: @mirrorintheskycashmere
